description_long: This is a medium-sized metal spoon with a gently curved handle and a rounded, shallow bowl. The handle is slightly tapered, widening toward the end, and features subtle ridges for grip. The bowl is oval-shaped and smoothly transitions into the handle, with a polished, reflective surface. The spoon's profile reveals a gentle upward curve, making it ergonomic for scooping. Its surface appears smooth and shiny, typical of stainless steel utensils. There are no visible embellishments or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian and modern appearance.
description: A polished metal spoon with a gently curved handle and a smooth, oval bowl. The surface is shiny and unadorned, reflecting a modern, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the spoon, with the bowl and handle clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gentle upward curve of the handle and the shallow depth of the bowl.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the width of the bowl and the tapering handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the ergonomic curve and the smooth transition from handle to bowl.
attribute_orientation: bowl facing upward, handle extending downward
attribute_contextual_placement: resting flat on a surface or nested with other utensils
attribute_proximity_to_other_objects: often placed next to forks and knives or stacked with similar spoons
